Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2025-05-17, 2025-05-20, 2025-07-11, 2025-08-15, 2025-06-30, 2025-05-18, 2025-05-19. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




This page contains reports that are tested or are known to produce false positives. Be careful with using this data.

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an aircraft crash
linked wikidata entry (Q219355)(Roswell incident article) is about an aircraft crash, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Roswell crash - an affected OSM element that may be improved

linked wikidata entry (Q1459010)(Northwest Airlines Flight 255 article) is about an aircraft crash, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Northwest Airlines Flight 255 Crash Site Memorial - an affected OSM element that may be improved

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a television station
linked wikidata entry (Q278194)(TA3 article) is about a television station, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or brand:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
TA3 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(1126956315)['wikidata'='Q9336358']; way(1126956316)['wikidata'='Q9336358']; way(239852814)['wikidata'='Q1003245']; way(517621575)['wikidata'='Q9336358']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a wikimedia page']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality
linked wikidata entry (Q58926430)(北后寺泥塑大佛 article) is about an object that exists outside physical reality, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
北后寺泥塑大佛 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an event
linked wikidata entry (Q1323528)(Digital marketing article) is about an event, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a television station
linked wikidata entry (Q1661550)(MLB Network article) is about a television station, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or brand:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
MLB Network - an affected OSM element that may be improved

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a motion
linked wikidata entry (Q5305656)(Drakes Estero article) is about a motion, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a wikimedia page
linked wikidata entry (Q6265895)(Category:Saline lakes of Australia article) is about a wikimedia page, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Salt Lakes - an affected OSM element that may be improved

way(98335181)['wikidata'='Q28720040']; way(98387710)['wikidata'='Q18581316']; way(98438156)['wikidata'='Q28720009']; way(996061693)['wikidata'='Q59214028']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an event
linked wikidata entry (Q122166122) is about an event, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
linked wikidata entry (Q49471688) is about an intentional human activity, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present

subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - for owner prefixed tags
owner:wikidata and owner:wikipedia tags link to a different objects (Q314862 vs Q2358363 wikidata id assigned to linked Wikipedia article) Note that this OSM object has owner:wikipedia tag that links redirect ('Studierendenwerk_Thüringen' to 'Studierendenwerk Thüringen').
Cafeteria "Zur Rosen" - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(3733395725)['owner:wikidata'='Q314862']['owner:wikipedia'='de:Studierendenwerk_Thüringen']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - for owner prefixed tags']


no longer existing brand (according to Wikidata) - and marked as active shop in OSM, with tagging referring to defunct one
Wikidata claims that assigned brand object no longer exists. That means that either this shop is gone or it is rebranded. Or brand:wikidata tag is wrong. Historical, no longer existing object should not be mapped in OSM. REMEMBER TO VERIFY! WIKIDATA QUALITY MAY BE POOR! WIKIDATA MUST NOT BE USED AS SOURCE! ALWAYS VERIFY!
wikidata Q1060537 is marked as dissolved
Forever 21 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikidata Q1462383 is marked as dissolved
Mayersche - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikidata Q62084089 is marked as dissolved
Columbia Bank - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikidata Q69365478 is marked as dissolved
CashMax - an affected OSM element that may be improved
